subcodes.first_line: God willing, on this divine Day thou shalt receive thy portion of the outpourings of the All-Merciful and drink from the ocean of wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله در این یوم الهی از فیوضات رحمانی قسمت بری و از بحر حکمت بیاشامی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation
